title: Unidentified man found dead at Hornlee Sportsfield
description: KNYSNA NEWS - The body of an unidentified...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - The body of an unidentified man was found at the Hornlee sports field on Friday 30 January, with circumstances surrounding the incident still unclear.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - The body of an unidentified man was found at the Hornlee sports field on Friday 30 January, with circumstances surrounding the incident still unclear."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"It is alleged that the man was at the field during Knysna Secondary School’s interhouse athletics on the day."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Reports indicate that he was seen lying on the field as the event concluded and participants and spectators were preparing to leave.","html":"Reports indicate that he was seen lying on the field as the event concluded and participants and spectators were preparing to leave."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Emergency services were called to the scene, where the man was reportedly declared dead.","html":"Emergency services were called to the scene, where the man was reportedly declared dead."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna-Plett Herald has requested confirmation and further details from Knysna Police.","html":"Knysna-Plett Herald has requested confirmation and further details from Knysna Police."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"This is a developing story and updates will be published as more information becomes available.","html":"This is a developing story and updates will be published as more information becomes available."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]

images.alt: Unidentified man found dead at Hornlee Sportsfield
